output.formatted:
Angela Lansbury

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?performer WHERE {
  wd:Q11424 wdt:P925 ?soundtrack .
  ?soundtrack wdt:P1135 ?song .
  ?song rdfs:label "Beauty and the Beast" @en .
  ?song wdt:P175 ?performer .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?song wdt:P175 wd:Q329598
  }
}
```

Got no rows and 1 columns
